section_name: Conduct of Investigation, Inquiry, or Hearing
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 3
### Chapter 21. Admin. of Aeronautics
##### § 21.152 — Conduct of Investigation, Inquiry, or Hearing

A member of the commission, the director, or an officer or employee of the department who has been designated by the commission to hold an investigation, inquiry, or hearing may:

    (1) administer an oath;

    (2) certify an official act;

    (3) issue a subpoena;

    (4) order the attendance and testimony of a witness; or

    (5) order the production of a paper, book, or document.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: A member of the commission, the director, or an officer or employee of the department who has been designated by the commission to hold an investigation, inquiry, or hearing may:
order the attendance and testimony of a witness; or
order the production of a paper, book, or document.
